name: Policy Traceability Check
description: Every generated requirement must cite source document section and version.

name: Regional Applicability Guardrail
description: Validate country region client type and risk rating before rendering requirements.

name: Maker Checker Review
description: Human maker checker review confirms extracted questions before operations use.

name: Evidence Completeness Rule
description: Block approval when mandatory evidence is missing.

name: Screening Completion Gate
description: Ensure sanctions and adverse media screening has passed before approval.

name: PII Masking Before LLM
description: Mask sensitive identifiers before sending data to an external or internal LLM.
